nameEn: Growing of other tree and bush fruits and nuts
description: This class includes the growing of berries, nuts and other tree and bush fruits.
includes: growing of berries: blueberries; currants; gooseberries; kiwi fruit; raspberries; strawberries; other berries
growing of edible nuts: almonds; cashew nuts; chestnuts; hazelnuts; pistachios; walnuts; other nuts
growing of other tree and bush fruits: carobs; other tree and bush fruits
